{{Infobox group
| name = Advocate
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocates]] are a group with highly polarized reputations across the galaxy. Originally emerging as a collection of vigilantes, they eventually attained a level of semi-official power due to their essential role in the [[Free Worlds]]. In those territories, they are viewed as exemplary citizens who risk themselves to protect various planets. However, perspectives differ elsewhere; the [[Alliance]] considers them an inefficient organization that lacks true military capability and fails to share their specialized [[Aethertech]]. While some see them as heroic protectors similar to the [[Titan Force]], others view them as a corrupt entity that prioritizes its public image above all else. They are also characterized by internal conflict regarding whether they should expand their influence throughout the galaxy or strictly adhere to their original purpose. Additionally, the group is known for its devotion to [[Starhammer]] and his personal missions.}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Advocates]] serve as entities responsible for the preservation of evidence. These figures, such as [[Clockworker]], are associated with colors like blue. During a confrontation, a witch Advocate was observed positioned back-to-back with a swordsman. Following these events, [[Mell]] was designated to be surrendered into the custody of an Advocate.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Blue]] is one of the colors used by the Advocates.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10">''The Engineer'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Clockworker]] is an [[Advocate]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40">''The Engineer'', chapter 40</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The witch [[Advocate]] was standing back-to-back with a swordsman.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c43">''The Engineer'', chapter 43</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Mell]] is to be turned over to [[Advocate]] custody.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c47">''The Engineer'', chapter 47</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Advocate]] is an entity that keeps evidence.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c52">''The Engineer'', chapter 52</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
